title: 2 and 3 factor decomposition
text:
Decomposition - {DasGuptR}
2 factor



library(tibble)

mydat <- tribble(
  ~pop,~psq,~pgr,
  "P1", 5/15, 3/5,
  "P2", 10/15, 8/10,
) 
mydat

# A tibble: 2 × 3
  pop     psq   pgr
  <chr> <dbl> <dbl>
1 P1    0.333   0.6
2 P2    0.667   0.8




library(DasGuptR)

dgres <- dgnpop(x = mydat,
       pop = "pop",
       factors = c("psq","pgr"))

head(dgres)

  rate pop std.set factor
1 0.20  P1    <NA>  crude
2 0.53  P2    <NA>  crude
3 0.23  P1      P2    psq
4 0.47  P2      P1    psq
5 0.30  P1      P2    pgr
6 0.40  P2      P1    pgr

title: 2 and 3 factor decomposition
text:
Decomposition - {DasGuptR}
2 factor



library(tibble)

mydat <- tribble(
  ~pop,~psq,~pgr,
  "P1", 5/15, 3/5,
  "P2", 10/15, 8/10,
) 
mydat

# A tibble: 2 × 3
  pop     psq   pgr
  <chr> <dbl> <dbl>
1 P1    0.333   0.6
2 P2    0.667   0.8




library(DasGuptR)

dgres <- dgnpop(x = mydat,
       pop = "pop",
       factors = c("psq","pgr"))

dg_table(dgres)

        P1   P2 diff decomp
psq   0.23 0.47 0.23     70
pgr   0.30 0.40 0.10     30
crude 0.20 0.53 0.33    100

title: 2 and 3 factor decomposition

library(tibble)

mydat <- tribble(
  ~pop,~pcol,~psq,~pgr,
  "P1", 11/15, 4/11, 3/4,
  "P2", 13/15, 10/13, 8/10,
) 
mydat

# A tibble: 2 × 4
  pop    pcol   psq   pgr
  <chr> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl>
1 P1    0.733 0.364  0.75
2 P2    0.867 0.769  0.8 




library(DasGuptR)

dgres <- dgnpop(x = mydat,
       pop = "pop",
       factors = c("pcol","psq","pgr"))

head(dgres)

  rate pop std.set factor
1 0.20  P1    <NA>  crude
2 0.53  P2    <NA>  crude
3 0.32  P1      P2   pcol
4 0.38  P2      P1   pcol
5 0.23  P1      P2    psq
6 0.48  P2      P1    psq

title: 2 and 3 factor decomposition
text:
Decomposition - {DasGuptR}
3 factor



library(tibble)

mydat <- tribble(
  ~pop,~pcol,~psq,~pgr,
  "P1", 11/15, 4/11, 3/4,
  "P2", 13/15, 10/13, 8/10,
) 
mydat

# A tibble: 2 × 4
  pop    pcol   psq   pgr
  <chr> <dbl> <dbl> <dbl>
1 P1    0.733 0.364  0.75
2 P2    0.867 0.769  0.8 




library(DasGuptR)

dgres <- dgnpop(x = mydat,
       pop = "pop",
       factors = c("pcol","psq","pgr"))

dg_table(dgres)

        P1   P2  diff decomp
pcol  0.32 0.38 0.059   17.6
psq   0.23 0.48 0.252   75.5
pgr   0.34 0.37 0.023    6.9
crude 0.20 0.53 0.333  100.0

title: 2 and 3 factor decomposition
text:
sub-populations



mydat <- tribble(
  ~pop, ~shape,    ~pshp, ~pgreen,
  1,    "circle",  10/24,  2/10,
  1,    "square",  10/24,  3/10,
  1,    "triangle", 4/24,  3/4,
  2,    "circle",   7/24,  2/7,
  2,    "square",   7/24,  4/7,
  2,    "triangle",10/24,  8/10,
)
mydat

# A tibble: 6 × 4
    pop shape     pshp pgreen
  <dbl> <chr>    <dbl>  <dbl>
1     1 circle   0.417  0.2  
2     1 square   0.417  0.3  
3     1 triangle 0.167  0.75 
4     2 circle   0.292  0.286
5     2 square   0.292  0.571
6     2 triangle 0.417  0.8  



Rate_green = sum ( prop_shape_i * prop_green_i )

title: 2 and 3 factor decomposition
text:
sub-populations

dgnpop(x = mydat,
       pop = "pop",
       factors = c("pshp","pgreen"),
       id_vars = c("shape"),
       ratefunction = "sum(pshp*pgreen)") |>
  dg_table()

          1    2 diff decomp
pshp   0.41 0.52 0.11     44
pgreen 0.40 0.54 0.14     56
crude  0.33 0.58 0.25    100
